encoding.description: Height = upper 2 bytes of IEEE 754 float32 LE. Lower 2 bytes always 00 00.

binaryInfo.searchMethod: GUID as ASCII text, 64MB chunks, 32-byte overlap
binaryInfo.heightLocation: X bytes BEFORE the GUID (auto-discovered per trap)
